final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic still, concept art
Primary request: cyberpunk future cityscape at night with towering skyscrapers, neon lights, flying vehicles, acid rain, and reflective puddles
Scene/backdrop: dystopian megacity at night, dense cluster of high-rise buildings, narrow streets below, dark polluted sky
Subject: futuristic metropolis with flying cars weaving between buildings, rain-soaked streets with puddles reflecting neon signs
Style/medium: cinematic digital art, cyberpunk aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low angle looking up at skyscrapers, depth showing layers of buildings
Lighting/mood: harsh neon glow mixed with dark shadows, rain diffusing light, melancholic and dystopian atmosphere
Color palette: dominant blue and purple tones, cyan and magenta neon accents, dark grays and blacks
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with reflective puddles, glass and steel surfaces, glowing neon tubes, rain streaks
Constraints: maintain blue-purple color dominance, preserve rainy atmosphere with visible rain drops and reflections
Avoid: clean utopian look, bright daylight, cheerful colors, watermark, lens flare overuse
